top_signals.title: China calls for APEC cooperation as commerce minister skips opening over ‘urgent official business’
top_signals.summary: China's international trade representative Li Chenggang said he was chairing Friday's meeting as Commerce Minister Wang Wentao had urgent matters to attend to.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Meta, Broadcom and others to launch $125 million semiconductor research hub at UCLA
top_signals.summary: Broadcom, Meta, Applied Materials, GlobalFoundries and Synopsys are joining forces to launch a $125 million "Semiconductor Hub" at UCLA.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: MoonPay expands into tokenized assets and DeFi markets with new platform for banks
Tepco employees recorded civil trials in violation of court rules
top_signals.summary: On the same day, Shikoku Electric Power and Chugoku Electric Power also admitted to making audio recordings in the courtroom.
